items.claim: Gable Steveson's first UFC opponent is a pure layup.
items.quote: you always kind of knew the first fight Steveson gets in the UFC is just going to be a pure layup.

items.claim: Mario Bautista is a better wrestler than Cory Sandhagen.
items.quote: I am just under the belief Mario Bautista's going to be a better wrestler than Cory Sandhagen here.

items.claim: Mario Bautista is capable of scramble wrestling for the duration of a fight.
items.quote: Mario can scramble wrestle the entire fight.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen has not had a high-quality win since beating Song Yadong four years ago.
items.quote: Sandhagen doesn't have a really good win since Song Yadong. And again, that was 4 years ago.

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis has a compromised chin.
items.quote: I feel like a lot of guys we've seen it, right? A lot of guys you just touch Dariush's chin right now, and he goes down.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett is capable of winning striking exchanges against Benoit Saint-Denis.
items.quote: He will have minute He will have moments where he wins on the feet against Benoit.

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis is currently dealing with a staph infection.
items.quote: I am seeing the tweets that Benoit does staff going into this fight.
